sections.markdown:
- Activity: Evening Run
- Started: 2026-03-23 19:50
- Distance: 7 km
- Moving time: 34:59
- Elapsed time: 34:59
- Elevation gain: 13.8 m
- Average heart rate: 174.7 bpm
- Max heart rate: 192 bpm
- Average watts: 246.5 W
- Average speed: 12 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `240` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `175.3 bpm`, ranging from `143.5` to `192.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `166.5 bpm` and second-half average HR was `183.7 bpm` (+17.2 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `179.6 spm`, with a working range of `140.0` to `206.7 spm` after excluding `2` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `178.2 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `180.9 spm` (+2.7 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:00 /km` across `6.989 km` in `34:59` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:11 /km` and second-half pace was `4:50 /km` (-20 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `174.7 bpm` average and `192 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `166.2 bpm` in the first half and `184.0 bpm` in the second (+17.8 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `34:59` out of `34:59` elapsed (100.0%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `2` stop segments and `0.2%` stationary samples, so the run stayed very continuous.

- Strava logged about `19.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `0.8 m` and `8.4 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `9.4 m` in the first half and `9.8 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
